nodes.context: Predominantly African-American prison gang formed in Folsom State Prison in the mid-1980s, active in California.
Street gang mentioned as providing recruitment pools for Black Guerrilla Family alongside Kumi 415.
Street gang mentioned as providing recruitment pools for Black Guerrilla Family alongside Kumi 415.
Prison gang with large numbers in Bay area and Northern California, which recruits from Kumi 415, Crips, and Bloods.

edges.evidence_quote: Along with the Crips and Bloods , Kumi 415 members have recently provided recruitment pools for the Black Guerrilla Family , a gang with similarly large numbers in the Bay area and Northern California .
edges.context: Kumi 415 members serve as a recruitment pool for the Black Guerrilla Family.

edges.context: Bloods members serve as a recruitment pool for the Black Guerrilla Family.

edges.evidence_quote: In the Monterey County Jail , brief alliances have been reported among the Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 during the period leading up to Stanley Williams ' execution.
edges.context: Brief alliances among Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 in Monterey County Jail.
edges.time_period: period leading up to Stanley Williams' execution
